name: Lab CC-201: Write Your First CLAUDE.md
postCreateCommand: npm install && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=lab-ai-coding-2026' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://litellm-anthropic-proxy-production.up.railway.app' >> ~/.bashrc && echo '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"numStartups":3,"installMethod":"global","oauthAccount":null,"primaryApiKey":"lab-ai-coding-2026"}' > ~/.claude.json && code --install-extension anthropic.claude-code --force
